summary: TWO_COLUMN function-space linearity. Left route 1 builds f+g, differentiates it into D(f+g), and leaves that curve as a faint grey ghost. Route 2 redraws f and g, transforms them into Df and Dg, then uses a left-to-right sweep where Df and Dg disappear at the same x-speed that the green Df+Dg curve appears. Right: route formulas and D(f+g)=Df+Dg make the additivity property explicit.
